---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Master of Public Health (MPH), Global Health</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Expected May 2026</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University &middot; Atlanta, GA &middot; GPA: 3.96/4.00</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Certificates: Data Science; Climate Change &amp; Health</li>
  <li>Coursework: Health Economic Evaluations, Epidemiologic Methods, Biostatistics, Applied Machine Learning, Implementation Science, R Programming, SAS, Python, Monitoring &amp; Evaluation, Evidence-Based Global Health Policy, GIS, Social Impact Management</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">M.A., Economics</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2016</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Amity School of Economics, Amity University &middot; Uttar Pradesh, India &middot; GPA: 8.28/10</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">B.A. (Hons.), Economics</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2014</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Miranda House, Delhi University &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Work Experience</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Graduate Research Assistant</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">May 2025 &ndash; Present</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Emory CPCRN / Emory Prevention Research Centre (EPRC) &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Designed and conducted program evaluation of lung cancer screening (LCS) interventions using mixed-methods approaches with 250+ healthcare providers, developing research protocols, survey instruments, and applying RE-AIM and CFIR frameworks to assess coverage gaps and implementation fidelity</li>
  <li>Conducted systematic review and survey data analysis of 64 research papers to evaluate cancer screening intervention strategies, synthesizing evidence to guide program strategy and policy recommendations</li>
  <li>Performed statistical analysis in R and Qualtrics to collect, clean, analyze, and interpret complex multi-source datasets for peer-reviewed publication</li>
  <li>Co-authored manuscript currently under peer review (Escoffrey et al., 2026) and presented findings at the 2025 Conference on the Science of Dissemination and Implementation in Health</li>
  <li>Designed training program materials and conducted readiness assessments for primary care providers in rural Southwest Georgia hospitals on evidence-based screening protocols</li>
  <li>Contributing to a Learning Collaborative with EPRC, designing and conducting training programs for medical doctors and public health professionals on evidence-based screening and implementation protocols</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Research Assistant</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">September 2025 &ndash; Present</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Fridovich-Keil Lab, Dept. of Human Genetics, Emory School of Medicine &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Conducted a comprehensive scoping review synthesizing evidence on growth and pubertal outcomes in children and young adults with Classic Galactosemia (CG) to advance clinical knowledge and inform evidence-based treatment guidelines</li>
  <li>Performed advanced cross-sectional and longitudinal statistical analyses in R examining growth trajectories in female CG patients benchmarked against CDC 2000 reference norms; employed linear mixed-effects models (LMMs) with interaction terms, Likelihood Ratio Tests for model selection, and non-parametric Wilcoxon rank-sum and signed-rank tests</li>
  <li>Developed proficiency in multi-domain clinical data management across growth and anthropometric records, reproductive/ovarian health outcomes, neurodevelopmental and motor skills assessments, and bone health (DEXA scans) within a REDCap-managed longitudinal database</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Teaching Assistant &mdash; Global Health 500</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">August &ndash; December 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Supported course operations on Canvas to streamline student access to course materials and announcements</li>
  <li>Graded assignments and delivered constructive, actionable feedback to enhance student learning outcomes</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">FACE Intern</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">September 2024 &ndash; May 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">The Task Force for Global Health &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Provided project management and data quality assurance support for the LRI Amsterdam project on compassionate healthcare for leprosy patients in India, contributing to a broader global health strategy</li>
  <li>Delivered targeted market intelligence through a literature review on ethical considerations in NTDs for Merck Germany, generating actionable recommendations for an international health partner</li>
  <li>Developed stakeholder-friendly communication materials, condensing a 30-page workshop report into a five-page visual summary, demonstrating effective knowledge translation</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Consultant</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">November 2021 &ndash; June 2024</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Sattva Media &amp; Consulting Pvt. Ltd &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Led strategic planning and program management for a state-level health systems strengthening initiative, coordinating across government departments, community stakeholders, and the Gates Foundation to advance equitable maternal and child health outcomes</li>
  <li>Managed multi-stakeholder engagement processes involving government officials, frontline health workers, NGO partners, and community representatives across Bihar's 38 districts to design and implement policy reforms</li>
  <li>Directed the Bihar State Health Digital Transformation Project, overseeing cross-functional teams and delivering a real-time Power BI command and control center monitoring facility-level data including NICU feeds across 11,725 healthcare facilities, a first-of-its-kind equity-focused infrastructure initiative</li>
  <li>Monitored state-level immunization initiatives for mothers and newborns across Bihar, tracking coverage trends, identifying equity gaps, and recommending evidence-based improvements to program leadership, directly informing vaccine delivery strategy for a population of 120+ million</li>
  <li>Led rollout of a statewide telehealth program for mental health services using a hub-and-spoke delivery model, coordinating implementation across primary and referral facilities and evaluating program reach and service utilization metrics</li>
  <li>Developed and executed the Sanitary Napkin Initiative across 143 medical educational institutions and 687 healthcare facilities, advancing reproductive health equity at scale</li>
  <li>Spearheaded change management strategy transitioning healthcare infrastructure from paper-based to digital systems, improving service delivery and accountability for low-income communities</li>
  <li>Compiled data from 45+ primary sources (key informant interviews, focus groups) into policy reports; created three digital health knowledge products for government and philanthropic audiences</li>
  <li>Represented the Government of Bihar at the International Maternal and Newborn Healthcare Conference (IMNHC) 2023, Cape Town</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Policy Research Associate</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">May 2017 &ndash; January 2019</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">PROAct, Derek O'Brien &amp; Associates Pvt. Ltd &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Led a six-person team producing policy and legislative research for Parliament, Standing Committees, and other platforms</li>
  <li>Advised the Chairman of the Parliamentary Standing Committee of Transport, Tourism &amp; Culture on five major policy topics including Air India Disinvestment and Port Management</li>
  <li>Investigated and furnished points for parliamentary debates on Farmer Distress &amp; Suicides, State of Economy, Disruption of Federal Structure, and Data Security and Privacy</li>
  <li>Collaborated with Project 39A (NLU Delhi) and drafted a report on scientific and legal aspects of the DNA Technology (Use and Application) Regulation Bill</li>
  <li>Collaborated with 10+ NGOs and civil society organizations including Access Now on policy advocacy interventions</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">LAMP Fellow</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2016 &ndash; April 2017</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">PRS Legislative Research &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Led legislative team at the office of Shri Gaurav Gogoi, Member of Parliament, Kaliabor, Assam</li>
  <li>Advised on 15+ legislations and policies; drafted more than 10 parliamentary motions, debates, and 45+ parliamentary questions</li>
  <li>Designed and put forward a Private Member's Legislation for the Protection of Rhinos by establishing a National Rhino Conservation Authority</li>
  <li>Co-authored an article with Mr Gogoi titled "Aiming for zero poaching of rhinos"</li>
</ul>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Publications &amp; Conferences</h2>
<div class="pub-entry">
  Escoffrey C, Lynam M, <strong>Kodali T</strong>, Anderson S, Kadoo R, Wells J, Moorshed AB, Sazdovska S, Wen F, Niyyar R (2026). A Systematic Review of Interventions to Increase Uptake of Lung Cancer Screening in the United States. <em>Manuscript under Review.</em>
</div>
<div class="pub-entry">
  Escoffrey C, Lynam M, <strong>Kodali T</strong>, Haardoerfer R, Hotz J, Yates J (2025). Lung Cancer Screening Survey among Georgia Healthcare Providers: Blueprint for lung cancer screening programs in Primary Care. <em>Poster, Conference on the Science of Dissemination and Implementation in Health; December 2025; National Harbor, MD.</em>
</div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Skills</h2>

<p><strong>Statistical &amp; Analytical</strong></p>
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">R (Intermediate)</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Python (Intermediate)</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">SAS (Intermediate)</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">SPSS</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Qualtrics</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">REDCap</span>
</div>

<p><strong>Machine Learning</strong></p>
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">LASSO &amp; Ridge Regularization</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Logistic Regression</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">k-Means Clustering</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">k-Fold Cross-Validation</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">ROC-AUC</span>
</div>

<p><strong>Visualization &amp; Informatics</strong></p>
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Power BI</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">ArcGIS</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Excel (Advanced)</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Shiny</span>
</div>

<p><strong>Research &amp; Policy</strong></p>
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">Program Evaluation</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Systematic Reviews</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Implementation Science</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">RE-AIM / CFIR</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Mixed Methods</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">IRB Protocol Development</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Policy Analysis</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Stakeholder Engagement</span>
</div>

<p><strong>Languages:</strong> Telugu (Native) &middot; Hindi (Native) &middot; English (Highly Proficient)</p>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Honors &amp; Awards</h2>
<div class="award-item">&#127942; Recognition Award &mdash; Shri Nitish Kumar, Chief Minister of Bihar (2022&ndash;23)</div>
<div class="award-item">&#127942; Best Performer Award &mdash; Department of Health, Government of Bihar (July 2023)</div>
<div class="award-item">&#127942; Citation &mdash; Deputy Chief Minister-cum-Health Minister, Bihar (March 2023)</div>
<div class="award-item">&#127942; Achiever's Award &mdash; Vice Chancellor, Amity University (May 2016)</div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Leadership</h2>
<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Program Manager &mdash; International Education Peace Volunteers (IEPV), Atlanta</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan 2025 &ndash; Present</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Co-VP &mdash; Rollins Environmental Health Action Coalition (REHAC), RSPH</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan &ndash; Dec 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Treasurer &mdash; Emory Students for One Health (ESOH), RSPH</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan &ndash; Dec 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Vice-President &mdash; Rollins mHealth Collaboration (RmC), RSPH</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan &ndash; Dec 2025</span>
</div>
</div>
```
